user.title: Meridian Energy
user.description: Enter the email address on your Meridian account. We'll send you a one-time login code.

otp.title: Enter the code we emailed you
otp.description: A one-time code was sent to {email}.

account.title: Choose account
account.description: Multiple Meridian accounts are linked to this login. Pick the one to track.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Meridian Energy
reauth_confirm.description: Your Meridian session expired. We'll email a new login code to {email}.

error.invalid_email: Could not send a login code to that email address.
error.invalid_otp: That code was incorrect or has expired.
error.unknown: Unexpected error talking to Meridian. Check the logs and try again.

abort.no_accounts: No Meridian accounts were found for this login.
